items.briefing:
Australian healthcare organisations should take note of a new partnership between Rubrik and MEDITECH aimed at strengthening cyber resilience in hospitals — a timely development given the sector's ongoing vulnerability to ransomware and data breaches. Separately, Darwinium has updated its mobile security tools to better detect scam activity, which is relevant as mobile-based scams continue to target Australians.

Scamwatch remains active with new alerts worth checking regularly if you receive unexpected calls, texts, or emails requesting personal or financial information.

**Practical tip:** Bookmark [scamwatch.gov.au](https://www.scamwatch.gov.au) and check it whenever something feels suspicious — it's updated frequently with the latest scam warnings affecting Australians.

featured.title: Rubrik & MEDITECH team up on hospital cyber resilience
featured.quote: Australian hospitals could recover patient records faster after ransomware attacks using Rubrik and MEDITECH.
